Provisao.Query: SELECT CONVERT(varchar(10), p.Vencimento, 103) AS Venc, CONVERT(varchar(10), p.VencimentoOriginal, 103) AS VencOrig, DATEDIFF(day, p.Vencimento, GETDATE()) AS Dias, p.Filial AS Filial, p.Apolice AS Apolice, p.Endosso AS Endosso, p.GrupoEconomico AS Grupo, p.Tomador AS Nome, p.Parcela AS Parcela, p.ValorTotal AS VlTotal, p.Prorrogacoes AS Prorr, c.Email AS Email, c.Telefone AS Fone, c.Responsavel AS Resp, c.Cnpj AS Cnpj FROM dbo.ProvisaoReceita p LEFT JOIN dbo.Contato c ON c.TomadorId = p.TomadorId WHERE p.Situacao = 'EM_ABERTO' ORDER BY p.Vencimento;
